Package io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.gift_and_giveaway

Class OwnedGift

java.lang.Object
io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.gift_and_giveaway.OwnedGift
public class OwnedGift extends Object
This object describes a gift received and owned by a user or a chat.
Since:
19 August 2025
Version:
1.3.0

Natanim
